title: Section 73
content: The first meeting of 1[2[the Corporation]] after a general election shall be held as early as possible after the publication of the results of the election 3*** under section 14 and shall be convened by the Administrator.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2 "the Corporation" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 2 . Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for "a Corporation" (w.e.f. 22-5-2022). 3. The words "of alderman" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, s. 53 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).
